CREATE TABLE test_html (id INT, html_content CLOB);
INSERT INTO test_html (id, html_content) VALUES (1, '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Test</title></head><body><h1>Hello World<h1></body></html>');

INSERT INTO test_html (id, html_content) VALUES (2, 'Test

Hello World

');

INSERT INTO test_html (id, html_content) VALUES (4, '

Test paragraph.

Unclosed div');
SELECT tidy_list_errors(html_content) FROM test_html WHERE id = 1;
SELECT tidy_list_errors(html_content) FROM test_html WHERE id = 2;
SELECT tidy_list_errors(html_content) FROM test_html WHERE id = 3;
SELECT tidy_list_errors(html_content) FROM test_html WHERE id = 4;
SELECT html_content FROM test_html WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_html WHERE html_content LIKE '%<div>%') AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_html WHERE html_content LIKE '%<h1>%');
SELECT tidy_list_errors(html_content) AS errors FROM (SELECT html_content FROM test_html WHERE html_content LIKE '%<body>%') AS subquery;
